title: Smoky Sweet Ethiopian Beef Grill
description: A tender, smoky grilled beef dish infused with sweet coconut sugar and traditional Ethiopian berbere spice for a Mediterranean-friendly dinner.

ingredients.name: sirloin steak
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into 2.5 cm cubes

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, combine coco sugar, berbere spice, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add minced garlic, ginger, lemon juice, and olive oil to the spice mix; stir to form a paste.
Fold beef cubes into the paste, ensuring each piece is well coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to marinate.
Remove beef from refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for 10 minutes before grilling.
Grill the beef cubes for 2-3 minutes per side, or until a desirable char and internal temperature of 63°C (145°F) is reached.
While grilling, lightly brush additional olive oil over the beef to keep it moist.
After grilling, transfer the beef to a serving platter and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
